name: hybrid_multivector_ceiling_breaker
activated_when: single-vector dense stagnates on MIRACL/general retrieval AFTER data + merge + distill have been exhausted (see docs/research/hybrid-multivector-ceiling-breaker.md)

modes.name: sparse_dense_hybrid
modes.desc: BM25/SPLADE sparse score fused with the dense score (e.g. RRF / weighted sum)

modes.name: splade_head
modes.desc: SPLADE-like learned sparse head on the encoder, if compatible

modes.name: bge_m3_style
modes.desc: joint dense + sparse + multi-vector representation, evaluated separately

modes.name: colbert_late_interaction
modes.desc: per-token vectors + MaxSim; a separate retrieval mode, not the dense product

modes.name: reranked_two_stage
modes.desc: dense first-stage + the existing Boldt reranker, as an alternative to a higher pure-dense frontier
